theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Patients/Users need warmth, calm, and trust. A dark UI feels clinical and unappetizing. We are using warm off-whites (stone) to replicate the feel of a physical kitchen counter, allowing the bright colors of the food and the traffic-light system of the Food Waste Tracker (Green, Amber, Red) to stand out clearly.

rules.anti_default_rule: Do not use Inter for headings. Keep weights extreme: Black (900) for big moments, Medium (500) for body.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards. No cramped elements. Mobile-first thumb zones are critical.

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-semibold text-lg flex-row items-center justify-center active:bg-orange-700
buttons.secondary: bg-stone-100 text-stone-800 rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-semibold text-lg flex-row items-center justify-center active:bg-stone-200
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-stone-600 py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex-row items-center justify-center

cards.base: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm mb-4
cards.recipe_card: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden mb-6
cards.fridge_item: flex-row items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl mb-3

inputs.text: bg-stone-50 border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 text-base text-stone-800 focus:border-orange-600 focus:bg-white

tags.base: px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full flex-row items-center gap-1.5

onboarding.layout: Full-screen background image with a dark gradient overlay at the bottom. Content (Title, Subtitle, CTA) is anchored to the bottom (safe area).

home_dashboard.layout: Top section: Greeting + Quick AI Generate button (prominent). Middle section: Bento grid for Fridge Summary (e.g., '3 Expiring Soon' in a red-tinted card). Bottom section: Suggested Recipes horizontal scroll.

fridge_management.layout: List view. Group items by expiry status (Critical first, Warning second, Fresh last). Use the empty_fridge_icon for zero-state.

recipe_generation.layout: Step-by-step form or a single scrollable view. Use large selectable pills for ingredient inclusion. 'Generate' button should be sticky at the bottom.

cooking_mode.layout: Immersive Dark Mode to save battery and reduce screen glare in the kitchen. Large typography. Swipeable horizontal PagerView for steps. Circular progress timer in the center.

onboarding_bg.description: Warm amber and orange gradient background with subtle grain. Use for Onboarding screen full background.

empty_fridge_icon.description: 3D minimalist icon of an empty open refrigerator. Use for Fridge empty state.

recipe_placeholder_1.description: Plated meal. Use as fallback image for generated recipes.

recipe_placeholder_2.description: Crab dish on white plate. Use as fallback image for generated recipes.

ingredients_fresh.description: Fresh vegetables. Use for category headers or AI generation banner backgrounds.

icons.rules: Use Lucide icons with 24px default size, stroke width 2. Match icon color to text context.

instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' or 'testID' (for React Native) attribute in kebab-case. Example: testID='login-submit-button'.
instructions_to_main_agent.react_native_rules: This is a mobile app. Use View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, FlatList. Map the provided Tailwind classes to NativeWind or StyleSheet. Avoid HTML tags (div, span, button).
instructions_to_main_agent.safe_area: Ensure all screens are wrapped in SafeAreaView to prevent overlap with notches.
instructions_to_main_agent.keyboard_handling: Wrap forms in KeyboardAvoidingView and ScrollView to ensure inputs remain accessible when keyboard is open.
instructions_to_main_agent.navigation: Use standard React Navigation patterns. Bottom Tab Navigator for main flows (Home, Fridge, Profile), Stack Navigator for flows like Recipe Detail and Cooking Mode.
instructions_to_main_agent.images: NEVER use placeholder services (e.g., via.placeholder.com). Use the URLs provided in 'media_urls' exclusively.
instructions_to_main_agent.card_borders: Do not use generic drop shadows for cards. Rely on the 1px subtle border (#E7E5E4) and rounded-3xl to separate content.
